market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: TeraWulf CEO: 'Not All Megawatts Are Created Equally' in AI Race
articles.description: TeraWulf says its $19 billion AI hosting agreement with Anthropic underscores its transformation from a Bitcoin miner into an AI infrastructure company.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: The wildest allegations in Apple’s trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI
articles.description: Apple’s trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI contains allegations that range from employees joking about unauthorized access to Apple’s systems to claims that job candidates were asked to bring Apple hardware to interviews. Here are the complaint’s most eye-catching claims.

articles.title: Trump's crypto riches loom over Clarity Act talks to ban conflicts for U.S. officials
articles.description: Discussion among Democrats have fixed on the president's personal gains when hashing out the crypto market structure bill's ethics provision.

articles.title: Sam Altman’s space data center trash talk is what most experts already believe
articles.description: Responding to Musk accusing him of being a scammer, Altman said, "homeboy you're the one sellling [sic] public market investors on short-term space datacenters."

articles.title: Bolivia mulls recognizing USDT as payment currency amid dollar shortage
articles.description: As foreign currency reserves remain under pressure, Bolivia is considering a framework to let the world’s largest stablecoin be used for payments, savings and trade.

articles.title: Investors send General Fusion soaring in debut as first publicly traded fusion company
articles.description: General Fusion started trading on the Nasdaq following a reverse merger that saw high redemptions.

articles.title: Hyundai completes USDT treasury settlement pilot between US and Mexico
articles.description: Hyundai completed a proof-of-concept using Tether's USDT to settle a cross-border treasury transfer between its US and Mexican subsidiaries, highlighting growing enterprise interest in stablecoin-based payments.

articles.title: Mizuho says Circle bank approval doesn't solve USDC growth, stablecoin competition risks
articles.description: Japanese investment bank Mizuho reiterated its neutral rating on Circle, saying OCC approval for a national trust bank doesn't address slowing USDC growth or rising competition.

articles.title: Should AI help you get away with killing your spouse?
articles.description: What does a world of total user-aligned AI actually look like?

articles.title: Donald Trump invokes US senator’s death to push crypto bill
articles.description: With the death of Senator Lindsey Graham and another senator hospitalized, Republicans’ current majority in the chamber has been reduced to 51-47, likely requiring more Democratic support to pass crypto market structure.

articles.title: Bitcoin panic-selling may be ending as sellers' profit margins disappear
articles.description: Analysts point to bitcoin’s resilience amid fresh U.S.-Iran escalation and renewed spot ETF inflows as the clearest signs yet that the marginal seller has stepped away.

articles.title: Strategy pauses its Bitcoin buying spree to hoard a massive $3 billion cash cushion
articles.description: Strategy now has more than 20 months of coverage for preferred-stock dividends and debt interest.

articles.title: Robinhood built a blockchain for tokenized stocks. Memecoins took over
articles.description: Robinhood Chain has pulled in $135 million of value and 800,000 addresses since July 1. Almost none of it is doing what the chain was built for.

articles.title: Bitcoin threatens $62K in risk-asset rout as Donald Trump says US will 'run' closed Hormuz Strait
articles.description: Bitcoin bulls faced an uphill struggle to preserve $62,000 as stocks opened down on Strait of Hormuz rhetoric between the US and Iran.

articles.title: Bolivia weighs adding Tether's USDT to its national payments system
articles.description: Crypto usage has spiked in the country, with transaction volumes hitting $430 million in the year after the central bank removed restrictions in mid-2024.

articles.title: 比太陽還古老！人類首度解碼星際彗星 3I/ATLAS 化學指紋，揭開遠古宇宙身世
articles.description: 天文學家利用位於智利的歐洲南方天文台（ESO）甚大望遠鏡（Very Large Telescope），詳細研究 […]

articles.title: SpaceX cleared to fly Starship again after booster failure in May
articles.description: This will be the first Starship test flight for SpaceX as a public company, testing the market's appetite for the company's "fly, fail, fix" approach to rocket development, which often ends in fireballs.

articles.title: Waze adds new AI-powered features and customization updates
articles.description: Some of the new features are powered by Google's Gemini AI assistant, which reflects the tech giant's broader push to integrate Gemini across its products while also better positioning Waze to compete with rival services such as Apple Maps.

articles.title: UK Treasury report on tokenization cites Ripple as convergence model
articles.description: A Treasury-backed report targets putting repo, gilts and funds onchain within two years, and warms to permissionless networks that firms like Ripple have been building on.
